topics.title: No personal income tax
topics.summary: UAE levies no personal income tax on salaries, capital gains, or dividends. Applies to residents and expats alike.

topics.title: Corporate Tax (effective 1 Jun 2023)
topics.summary: 9% corporate tax on taxable profits above AED 375,000. Qualifying Free Zone persons may be taxed at 0% on qualifying income.

topics.title: VAT
topics.summary: 5% standard VAT since 1 Jan 2018. Mandatory registration above AED 375,000 taxable supplies; voluntary from AED 187,500.

topics.title: GPSSA pension (Nationals)
topics.summary: UAE/GCC nationals contribute 5% (employee) + 12.5% (employer) + 2.5% (government) of pensionable salary. Does not apply to expats.

topics.title: End-of-Service Gratuity
topics.summary: Expats receive gratuity on termination: 21 days' wages/year for first 5 years, 30 days/year thereafter, capped at 2 years' total wage.
